meta.title: Actual Budget Mobile — Privacy-first budgeting for iOS
meta.description: Your budget, your pocket. Local-first, CRDT-synced, open source budgeting app for iPhone. Join the waitlist.

hero.title: Your budget, your pocket.
hero.subtitle: The privacy-first budgeting app for iOS. Local-first, real-time sync, open source.

features.heading: Built for privacy. Designed for you.

localFirst.title: Local-first
localFirst.description: Your financial data stays on your device. No third-party servers, no data mining.

sync.title: Real-time Sync
sync.description: CRDT-based sync keeps all your devices in perfect harmony, even offline.

envelope.title: Envelope Budgeting
envelope.description: Give every dollar a job with zero-based budgeting. Track spending by category.

privacy.title: End-to-End Encrypted
privacy.description: AES-256-GCM encryption. Self-host your server or go fully local. You own your data.

step1.title: Connect
step1.description: Point the app to your Actual Budget server — or use local-only mode.

step2.title: Organize
step2.description: Create accounts, categories, and budgets. Import existing data seamlessly.

step3.title: Track
step3.description: Log transactions on the go. Your budget updates in real time across every device.

screenshots.heading: Designed for iOS
screenshots.subtitle: A native experience that feels right at home on your iPhone.
screenshots.compat: Fully compatible with your Actual Budget server

waitlist.heading: Be the first to try it
waitlist.subtitle: We're building the best budgeting experience for iOS. Join the waitlist and get early access.
